title: Checkout API returning 500s after deploy
description: Error rate on /checkout jumped to 40% right after release v2.31. Logs show NullPointerException in PaymentService.
resolution: Rolled back deployment v2.31 to v2.30. Error rate recovered in 4 minutes. Root cause was a null config value.

title: Postgres connection pool exhausted
description: FATAL: remaining connection slots are reserved. App timeouts across all services. Connection count pinned at max_connections.
resolution: Terminated idle-in-transaction sessions and restarted app pods to release leaked connections. Added PgBouncer afterwards.

title: Pods OOMKilled in payments namespace
description: payments-worker pods restarting every few minutes with reason OOMKilled. Memory limit 512Mi being hit under load.
resolution: Raised memory limit to 1Gi and scaled replicas from 3 to 5. Restarts stopped.

title: DNS resolution failures to internal services
description: Intermittent 'could not resolve host' errors. CoreDNS pods showing high CPU and dropped queries.
resolution: Restarted wedged CoreDNS pods and scaled the deployment. Resolution recovered immediately.

title: TLS certificate expired on api.example.com
description: Clients getting 'certificate has expired'. Handshake failures on the public ingress.
resolution: Renewed the certificate and reloaded the ingress. Added a 30-day expiry alert to prevent recurrence.

title: Disk full on logging node
description: no space left on device on node-7. Log shipping failed and writes started erroring.
resolution: Rotated and shipped old logs, pruned unused container images, then expanded the volume.

title: Redis high CPU causing slow responses
description: Redis at 95% CPU, p99 latency on cart service degraded. A hot key was being scanned repeatedly.
resolution: Identified the hot key with a full scan, added caching at the app layer, and the CPU dropped back to normal.

title: Slow queries after missing index
description: Reporting dashboard timing out. pg_stat_statements shows one query doing a sequential scan on a 20M row table.
resolution: Added an index on the filter column. Query time dropped from 12s to 80ms.

title: Rate limit errors from payment provider
description: 429 Too Many Requests from upstream payment API during a flash sale. Retries made it worse.
resolution: Added exponential backoff and a short-lived cache, and requested a higher quota from the provider.

title: Network partition between AZs
description: Cross-AZ traffic dropping, replicas marked unhealthy. Brief split-brain on the cache cluster.
resolution: Failed over to the healthy AZ and let the partition heal. Adjusted health-check thresholds afterwards.

title: Memory leak in notification service
description: notification-svc memory climbs steadily over ~6 hours until OOM and restart. Repeats daily.
resolution: Captured a heap profile, found an unbounded queue, shipped a fix to cap it. Restarted to restore capacity meanwhile.

title: Scheduled maintenance reminder
description: Informational: database maintenance window scheduled for Saturday 02:00 UTC. No action needed now.
resolution: Acknowledged. Posted reminder to the ops channel.
